entries.title: Widgets admin index.
entries.notes: Shows reusable widgets, component/search columns, filters, and table actions.
entries.useCase: An administrator scans reusable widgets by component, usage, status, and search/filter state.

entries.title: Create/edit widget form with widget assets.
entries.notes: Capture the component, display, settings, translations, and asset configuration tabs.
entries.useCase: An editor configures a reusable widget, its display settings, translations, and widget assets.

entries.title: Widgets admin index in dark mode.
entries.notes: Dark-mode companion capture for the reusable widgets admin index.
entries.useCase: An administrator scans reusable widgets by component, usage, status, and search/filter state in dark mode.

entries.title: Create/edit widget form in dark mode.
entries.notes: Dark-mode companion capture for widget configuration and assets.
entries.useCase: An editor configures a reusable widget, its display settings, translations, and widget assets in dark mode.

entries.title: Layout Builder editor screen.
entries.notes: Shows the dual-mode page composition screen with layout areas and widgets.
entries.useCase: An editor composes a page visually with reusable widgets and named layout areas.

entries.title: Layout Builder editor screen in dark mode.
entries.notes: Dark-mode companion capture for the dual-mode page composition screen.
entries.useCase: An editor composes a page visually with reusable widgets and named layout areas in dark mode.

entries.title: Sections admin index.
entries.notes: Shows package-specific section and layout table state.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews layout sections and layout-builder managed records.

entries.title: Sections admin index in dark mode.
entries.notes: Dark-mode companion capture for package-specific section and layout table state.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews layout sections and layout-builder managed records in dark mode.

entries.title: Public page rendering Layout Builder widgets.
entries.notes: Anonymous public page render with seeded widgets; must expose no admin/editor state.
entries.useCase: An anonymous visitor sees seeded layout widgets rendered as safe public HTML.

entries.title: Public page rendering Layout Builder widgets in dark mode.
entries.notes: Dark-mode companion capture for anonymous public page rendering with seeded widgets.
entries.useCase: An anonymous visitor sees seeded layout widgets rendered as safe public HTML in dark mode.
